headline: Company Presentation
subheadline: Proudly representing Czech aerospace engineering, avionics, and mission systems integration.
cta: AIR TEAM – YOUR MISSION. OUR TECHNOLOGY.

headline: We are AIR TEAM.
body:
AIR TEAM holding is a leading European specialist in avionics, ISR (Intelligence, Surveillance & Reconnaissance), and mission systems integration. Our core business in aero upgrades and cabin solutions is complemented by full-service support for key accounts, authorized maintenance, and global parts supply via our e-shop.

Operating under EASA Part 145 & Part 21J / 21G & FAA Repair Station with integrated ITAR compliance, AIR TEAM combines engineering excellence with a strong European logistics and distribution network.

headline: A holding built around aircraft that have to fly.
subheadline: Mission systems, engineering, MRO, and supply under one roof.

cards.body: Years in aviation
Certified projects
Countries served

hoverCards.label: Mission
hoverCards.body: ISR systems, mission architecture, tactical communication, and airborne intelligence programs for government and defense customers.

hoverCards.label: Engineering
hoverCards.body: Customizable upgrade solutions for the whole aircraft. We replace outdated components with modern systems that improve form, function, and operational capability.

hoverCards.label: MRO
hoverCards.body: Aircraft maintenance, repairs, component work, installations, and hangar execution.

hoverCards.label: Supply
hoverCards.body: Aviation support and logistics for OEMs, government clients, defense primes, and B2B/B2C customers. We supply pilot equipment, avionics, aircraft parts, and consumables through long-term partnerships built on quality and reliability.

headline: Government & ISR Programs.
body: AIR TEAM Intel specializes in ISR and technology integrations for the defense and security sector, acting as a partner to government and military customers.
bullets: Government Programs Prime Contractor: acts as the leading entity for government aviation programs, responsible for compliance, program structure, and lifecycle delivery.

ISR Integration Project Management: manages full integration projects for ISR systems, from requirements definition through integration, testing, and final handover, using Advanced System Integration capability as its technical base.

R&D Program Management: leads R&D initiatives related to ISR, mission systems, avionics modernization, and tactical communication technologies, contributing to the holding's long-term R&D and certification capacity.

headline: Engineering & Certification.
body: The engineering division is the design and certification center behind advanced system integration.
bullets: Organization & Role: DOA-based engineering and certification center. Core of the Advanced System Integration pillar.
Aircraft & Systems Engineering: avionics architecture, electrical systems, rewiring, integration brackets, racks, supports, panels, monuments, and cabin equipment.

Certification Engineering: compliance demonstration under CS-23, CS-25, CS-27, and CS-29. STC development, major/minor change classification and approval, weight and balance, electrical safety, and aviation authority liaison.

Integration & Project Management: avionics upgrades, ISR payload integration, mission-system architecture, milestone/risk management, coordination across DOA-POA-145-Intel-Interiors, and technical configuration management.

headline: MRO + POA + CRO.
body: AIR TEAM service is the operational execution arm of the holding, combining certified maintenance, approved design procedures, production capability, and component repair.
bullets: MRO Part 145: mechanical and electrical maintenance and modifications, with hangar capacity and specialist shops.
DOA Part 21J: AP, alternative procedures for approved design and modifications.
POA Part 21G: production of specific parts, harnesses, and assemblies.
CRO, Component Repairs & Overhauls: integrated component repair and overhaul capability.
Core Services: avionics upgrades (Garmin and others), electrical troubleshooting, wiring repairs, and modifications.
ISR Installations: installation and integration of ISR mission systems on aircraft and helicopters, based on engineering packages from AIR TEAM Engineering and program management from AIR TEAM Intel.
E-Commerce & Logistics Backbone: modern logistics, tailored ERP, advanced CRM, and a multilingual e-commerce portal ensure tight integration between parts, repairs, and installations.

headline: Parts Supply.
body: The AIR TEAM Smart Supply division operates a comprehensive B2B/B2C platform serving as a strategic supplier of pilot supplies, avionics, and aircraft parts.
bullets: Business Model & Infrastructure: B2B and B2C e-commerce platform with integrated ERP, CRM, modern logistics, multilanguage, and multicurrency support.
Product Portfolio: pilot supplies, avionics, instruments, aircraft/engine parts, and consumables.
Private Labels: PilotStyle and AEROSPEC, launching 2025-2026.
Logistics & Performance: 90% of EU orders delivered within 48 hours.
Target Demographics: B2C hobby/student pilots and enthusiasts ages 20-50; B2B purchasing and fleet managers in aviation companies.

cards.body: Clear path to more than 80% export revenue and more than 70M EUR turnover by 2030, with EMEA, selected Asian regions, and NATO/EU defence programs.

headline: Where AIR TEAM is heading.
bullets: Expand certified avionics, ISR, and mission-system integration across EMEA.
Strengthen mission systems, engineering, MRO, and supply under one holding.
Build export-driven growth with selected regional hubs and long-term key accounts.
Use data, logistics, and certified execution to shorten aircraft downtime and keep projects moving.

headline: Proof in the work. Discipline in the crew.
body:
We are the AIR TEAM crew. Pilots, technicians, avionics specialists, and people from the field. We know what it feels like when the hangar is waiting on the final measurement, the customer needs a clear status, and the decision cannot wait until tomorrow.

In aviation, impressions do not hold. Preparation does. Precision does. So does the person who understands why the procedure exists. AIR TEAM is a holding built on field experience. We integrate avionics, certify upgrades, service aircraft, supply cockpit equipment, and build solutions for operations, oversight, and special missions.

cards.title: Certified capability
cards.body: Part 145, Part 21J DOA, Part 21G POA, FAA Repair Station, NATO AQAP 2110, MAA CZ.

cards.title: Full lifecycle coverage
cards.body: Mission integration, engineering, certification, MRO, component repair, and supply.

cards.title: Fast supply chain
cards.body: 90% of EU orders delivered within 48 hours.

headline: YOUR MISSION. OUR TECHNOLOGY.
body: Our mission is to empower pilots, operators, and governments to fly safer, smarter, and further - combining data, engineering excellence, and reliable logistics.
